title: Hero — cost breakdown
prompt: Our log bill jumped this week. What's driving it and what's the safest pattern to mute? Give me concrete dollar figures and a specific recommendation.
persona: You are a senior SRE at a SaaS company. You manage observability cost across many services. You are answering an ad-hoc question from your VP of Engineering and the answer needs to be defensible — every number must trace to a tool result.
budget_hint: Aim for 4-8 tool calls. The user wants a tight, defensible answer.
